gatewayMint(bytes,bytes).notice: Mints USDC on the destination chain from a Gateway API         attestation. The attestation's TransferSpec encodes the         destinationRecipient (who receives the mint) and the         destinationCaller (who is allowed to submit it — this         contract, when used via subscribeViaGateway()).
